title: scRNA-seq background RNA
author: Philipp Janssen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data files to benchmark background RNA estimation and removal files We uploaded 5 zip files, each corresponding to one 10x experiment of a mixture of mouse kidney cells from 3 mouse strains BL6, SVLMJ and CAST. The data contain information from genotype based demultiplexing also at a feature resolution. 
 We added now also intermediate files of the genotype analysis. 
 The main change in v3 is the addition of the cellranger bam files.
steps_raw:
Data files to benchmark background RNA estimation and removal files We uploaded 5 zip files, each corresponding to one 10x experiment of a mixture of mouse kidney cells from 3 mouse strains BL6, SVLMJ and CAST. keywords: scRNA-seq, background RNA, benchmark dataset, mouse subspecies, kidney
